title: Environmental Improvement Plan: annual progress report 2024 to 2025
body: "This report sets out the progress made in 2024 to 2025 towards the goals in the Environmental Improvement Plan 2023 (EIP23).   The annex provides more information on the challenges and processes involved in monitoring legally binding Environment Act targets.   Alongside the annual progress report, the Outcome Indicator Framework data dashboard shows how the environment is changing in relation to the 10 goals of the 25 Year Environment Plan. "
